meta.title: Single Draw Outs
meta.description: Count outs for common single draws: flush draws, straight draws, and overcards.

blocks.content:
## Single Draw Outs

Count how many outs you have for each draw. Focus on one draw at a time — we'll get to combo draws in the next module. Take your time and build that counting reflex!

blocks.title: Single Draw Outs Drill
blocks.instructions: Count the number of outs that complete your draw. Only count clean outs for the specific draw described.
